name: PT Bank Permata Tbk
summary: PT Bank Permata Tbk provides banking products and services to retail, SME, and wholesale customers in Indonesia. The company offers current accounts and time deposits; savings products; mortgages; personal and working capital loans, and loans for SME, as well as trade and supply chain financing; and credit and debit cards. It also provides mutual funds, bonds, and bancassurance products; wealth and cash management, treasury, and capital market services; and transaction and Syariah banking, as well as e-banking services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 70 branches, 214 sub-branches, 281 Sharia office channeling, 17 cash offices, and 4 mobile cash offices, as well as 925 ATMs. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Bali Tbk and changed its name to PT Bank Permata Tbk in October 2002. PT Bank Permata Tbk was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bank Permata Tbk is a subsidiary of Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited.
